life is full of beautiful moments & capturing it with @nikonsg @nikonmalaysia Z6III in #kuantan #malaysia ✨📸🪁🏄‍♂️🎣✨

📍capturing little moments of locals at the beach, silat fighting, kite making & batik painting 

📍6k/60p RAW in-camera recording, advanced portraiture, edit and mix sound easily in post-production with the new line-in mode
